2026-0328
2026-04-16CRAFinancial Administration ActOrder Amending the Treaty Land Entitlement (Saskatchewan) Remission OrderOrder Amending the Treaty Land Entitlement (Saskatchewan) Remission Order in order to remits the tax payable on land purchases made by certain Indian bands of Saskatchewan in settlement of treaty land entitlement claims pursuant to the terms of binding agreements entered into by the bands, the Government of Canada and the Government of Saskatchewan.N/A
subject: Order Amending the Treaty Land Entitlement (Saskatchewan) Remission Order
precis: Order Amending the Treaty Land Entitlement (Saskatchewan) Remission Order in order to remits the tax payable on land purchases made by certain Indian bands of Saskatchewan in settlement of treaty land entitlement claims pursuant to the terms of binding agreements entered into by the bands, the Government of Canada and the Government of Saskatchewan.
